name: 内格夫 | 深蓝电镀处理
nameZh: 内格夫 | 深蓝电镀处理
descriptionEn: The Negev is a beast that can keep the enemy at bay with its pin-point supressive fire, provided you have the luxury of time to gain control over it. It has been painted with a chrome base coat and candied in transparent navy blue anodized effect paint.
descriptionZh: 子弹极多，射速极快的内格夫非常适合在多数回合中快速清场，作为交换，它的价格极其不菲，具有高扩散和令人发狂的后坐力。 这把武器使用铬外表，通过半透明的深蓝电镀处理进行了涂装。
